articles.title: CoreLogic Wraps Up $5.25 Billion Debt Deal With Hefty Yields
articles.summary: CoreLogic Inc. raised $5.25 billion from a debt sale after amending the terms and offering some of the year’s highest yields in response to lukewarm investor demand.
